source_pr.title: types: fix decimal tests failed
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix occasional tests failed for package type

### What is changed and how it works?
move test `TestShift ` and `TestFromString` to serial suite because the will change global variable `wordBufLen` thus cause parse decimal failed when run in parallel.

close #14612, close #14706 


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test
 - Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
 - No code

symptoms: PR body: "fix occasional tests failed"; tests change global variable wordBufLen causing decimal parse failure in parallel.
failure_signature: PR body: "fix occasional tests failed"; tests change global variable wordBufLen causing decimal parse failure in parallel.

evidence: evidence: PR body: "fix occasional tests failed"; tests change global variable wordBufLen causing decimal parse failure in parallel.
evidence: diff creates SerialSuites suite and moves TestShift/TestFromString there (types/mydecimal_test.go).
